title: Half Past Silence
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: A deaf detective investigating a string of arsons in a coastal town discovers the fires are synchronized to an ultrasonic frequency only children can hear, and the next trigger is primed at the school.
long_description: A deaf detective investigating a string of arsons in a coastal town discovers the fires are synchronized to an ultrasonic frequency only children can hear, and the next trigger is primed at the school.
